subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Bear thou witness that verily there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Conquering, the All-Powerful, and that 'Alí before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان اشهد علی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز الغالب القدیر و ان علیا قبل
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
